/usr/bin/ar qc libATCore.a CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/address.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/asyncdispatcherimpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/atascii.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/bussignal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/checksum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/checksum_intrin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/configvar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/consoleoutput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/crc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/decmath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/deferredevent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/deviceimpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/deviceparentimpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/devicesioimpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/devicestorageimpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/enumparse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/fft_scalar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/md5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/memoryutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/notifylist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/profile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/progress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/propertyset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/randomization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/savestate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/serialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/sioutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/snapshotimpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/vfs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/fft_sse2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCore.dir/source/fft_avx2.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libATCore.a
